name: dimly lit Elevator Shaft
description: I'm in a dimly lit Elevator Shaft
hints: Top of the elevator shaft (level 4). It's dimly lit - look around carefully.
LOOK SHAFT reveals tool niches. LOOK NICHE finds hidden items. WEST to penthouse.
LOOK NICHE auto-drops a hidden item. DOWN to shaft level 3 (room 11). WEST to penthouse (room 15).
notes: Top of elevator shaft (level 4). LOOK NICHE finds hidden item. LOOK SHAFT gives clue about niches. WEST to penthouse (room 15). DOWN to shaft level 3 (room 11).
